category_sources: source_facts.description says Little CMS 2 is a color management engine supporting ICC profiles.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Little CMS site; source_facts.name specifies the Homebrew package for the Little CMS 2 series.
docs_sources: Official Little CMS site is the project homepage; official GitHub repository README points users to the doc folder for complete documentation.
repo_sources: Official Little CMS GitHub repository links back to www.littlecms.com and contains the project source; source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ICC color management; official Little CMS materials describe an open-source CMM engine and ICC profile support.
